title: pelargonium × smithii
intro: Pelargonium × smithii, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium, known for its fragrant leaves and attractive flowers. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × smithii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically to the skin or inhaled to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
